oneLiner: A native macOS terminal emulator (SwiftUI + embedded Ghostty) with a workspace model and CLI built for driving Claude Code sessions.
next: Daily-drive v1.0.0 (session model) and triage regressions; small follow-up candidates: Reset Name (custom‚Üíauto), worktree-leak-on-close, Escape-vs-‚åòW placeholder binding.
Validate the /tian implement harness (bumped to v1.2.0 for the session model) on a real multi-slice run: async fan-out overlap + structured handoff (ADR 0003).

milestones.title: Agent delegation (/tian implement) shipped in a release

shipped.summary: Session Overview grid (mission-control cards): an overlay showing every Claude session across the window's workspaces as a card (name, state dot, branch/diff, status label, live Claude-pane text preview). Toggle via ‚åò‚áßO or a button beside the sidebar collapse toggle; click-to-activate; Escape dismisses; untinted Liquid Glass backdrop. Built clean; tianTests green (1 pre-existing git-graph flake, unrelated); /code-review medium findings fixed. Delivered via /orchestrate (5 agents, peak width 2).

Released v1.0.0 ‚Äî the Workspace‚ÜíSession model goes public (major bump): built, notarized (Apple Accepted), stapled, Gatekeeper-clean; GitHub Release live; Sparkle appcast signed + pushed (the v0.18.0 sign_update gotcha is resolved ‚Äî the EdDSA key is now in the keychain and verified against SUPublicEDKey).

Workspace‚ÜíSession hierarchy flatten merged (ADR 0004): removed Spaces/Sections/Tabs ‚Äî a session = one never-split Claude pane + toggleable terminal panel; persistence v6‚Üív7 migration; clean-break IPC/CLI v2 (session verbs, TIAN_SESSION_ID); sessions auto-name from the Claude pane title; Claude exit closes the session; terminal spawn + inspect panel follow Claude's EnterWorktree. Verified: 907 tianTests green, live v6‚Üív7 + CLI smoke, 8-angle adversarial review with all confirmed findings fixed.

Released v0.18.0 (sidebar tab-name + per-tab branch rows): built, notarized (Apple Accepted), stapled, GitHub Release live, Sparkle appcast signed + pushed. Gotcha: the Sparkle EdDSA private key is NOT in the local keychain, so publish.sh dies at sign_update ‚Äî signed the DMG directly via `sign_update --ed-key-file` after verifying the key derives to the app's SUPublicEDKey (KDEXWrfR‚Ä¶).
